title: eriocaulon quinquangulare subsp. quinquangulare
intro: Eriocaulon quinquangulare subsp. quinquangulare, also known as the five-angled pipewort, is a type of plant that belongs to the Eriocaulaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eriocaulon quinquangulare subsp. quinquangulare include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, Eriocaulon quinquangulare subsp. quinquangulare is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
